problem id: e24c8980
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  10000111 -> 11011110
  11111111 -> 11100011
  11100001 -> 00101111
  11011010 -> 11010011
  01110011 -> 00100111
  00010101 -> 11010101
  11111101 -> 10100011
  00101111 -> 10001000
  00010000 -> 11110111

query: 11001011
predicted answer: 01111011
